mean_en: a formal meeting or series of meetings of a court, a parliament, etc.; a period of time when such meetings are held; a period of time that is spent doing a particular activity
sentence: An important session was held on investment policies.
sentence_trans: 一个关于投资政策的重要会议召开了。
word_etyma: ses=sed坐下 + sion名词后缀 → 需要坐下的情况 → session会议
